system.description:
### Tier 3 Support A corrupted Turian strategos that hardens nearby allies with carapace plating. Motives & Tactics: Fortify, cover

#### Features Carapace Fortification - Action: The Marauder screams, signaling the Reaper signal. Up to 3 allies within Far range restore 2 HP and their Minor Threshold increases by 3 for the remainder of the scene.

Tactical Elbow - Reaction: If a PC enters Melee range, the Marauder may spend 1 Fear to strike them for 1d12+5 phy damage and push them to Close range.

Covering Fire - Passive: When an ally within Far range of the Marauder moves, the Marauder may make a free Standard Attack against any PC that has "Spotlight" on that ally.

}}

{{adversary,
